FLAG (2026-07-24 editorial wave 7): CONFIRMED this is a real, distinct event from granfondo-ecuador.json (a separate, newer UCI Gran Fondo World Series race in the same town) — different organizer (GFNY vs. MACMANE S.A.S.), different course (110.8km point-to-point/loop via Cerro El Morro vs. 127.88km multi-lap circuit), different date (March 1 vs. November 14). Elevation/distance were already reasonably close to organizer-confirmed figures; minor precision fix only (104.6->110.8km).

course_description.character: GFNY's inaugural Salinas edition (March 1, 2026) opened with a roughly 2 km neutralized rollout before racing began in earnest at Cerro El Morro/La Chocolatera, on Ecuador's Santa Elena Pacific coast. Riders encountered rain, fog, and exposed coastal crosswinds during the debut running. This is a separate event from the newer, UCI-sanctioned Granfondo Ecuador (see granfondo-ecuador.json), which debuts in the same town in November 2026 under a different organizer on a different multi-lap circuit course.
course_description.signature_challenge: Cerro El Morro/La Chocolatera — the race's decisive climbing zone, reached after the neutralized rollout from the start.
suffering_zones: Cerro El Morro/La Chocolatera — the main climbing test
Exposed Pacific coastal sections — the 2026 debut edition saw rain, fog, and crosswinds

logistics.lodging_strategy: Wide range of hotels available in Salinas, with race week activities at Salón Hotel Presidente including Pasta Fest and group ride.[1][2]
logistics.transport: Start/finish near Cerro El Morro/La Chocolatera, Salinas.

history.origin_story: Inaugural GFNY Salinas edition held March 1, 2026, part of the global GFNY series. A two-kilometre neutralized section preceded racing proper at Cerro El Morro. This is a separate event from the newer, UCI-sanctioned Granfondo Ecuador (see granfondo-ecuador.json), which debuts in the same town in November 2026 under a different organizer (MACMANE S.A.S.) on a different course.

biased_opinion.verdict: A Real GFNY Debut — Just Not the Only Salinas Race
biased_opinion.summary: GFNY Salinas is a genuine, confirmed GFNY-series event that held its inaugural edition on March 1, 2026, on Ecuador's Santa Elena coast — a 110.8 km course via Cerro El Morro that saw real weather (rain, fog, coastal crosswinds) on debut. GFNY's own post-event reporting is conclusive evidence this happened as scheduled. The one thing to get right: this catalog also carries a second, genuinely separate event in the same town — Granfondo Ecuador, a new UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier organized by a different company (MACMANE S.A.S.) on a different multi-lap circuit, debuting in November 2026. They share a location, not an organizer, course, or date — don't conflate them.
strengths: A real, GFNY-network event with organizer-published post-event reporting confirming it ran as scheduled
Distinctive coastal Ecuadorian setting (Cerro El Morro/La Chocolatera) among GFNY's typically mountain-pass-oriented courses
Full aid-station support and race-week festival activities (Pasta Fest, group ride) in Salinas
weaknesses: Only one edition run so far (March 2026) — limited track record to judge organizational consistency
No verified field-size or entry-fee data available for this review
Easily confused with the separate, newer Granfondo Ecuador event in the same town — different organizer, course, and date
Debut edition faced real weather disruption (rain, fog, crosswinds), which may or may not recur in future years
biased_opinion.bottom_line: A legitimate GFNY-series debut worth considering on its own terms — just be clear that it is a different race from Granfondo Ecuador, not a rebrand of it, despite sharing a host town.

final_verdict.one_liner: GFNY's confirmed inaugural Salinas edition (March 2026) via Cerro El Morro — a separate race from the newer UCI Granfondo Ecuador event in the same town.
final_verdict.should_you_race: Yes if you want a GFNY-network event on Ecuador's Pacific coast — just confirm you're registering for this race and not the separate, newer Granfondo Ecuador qualifier debuting in November.
final_verdict.alternatives: For the newer UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier in the same town, see granfondo-ecuador.json (different organizer, course, and November date).

eligibility.notes: UPDATED (2026-07-24, codex gpt-5.6-sol web research): CONFIRMED active and already run — GFNY's own March 3, 2026 report describes the inaugural GFNY Salinas edition as held March 1, 2026, with a 110.8km/878m course via Cerro El Morro, encountering rain, fog, and exposed coastal crosswinds. This is conclusive evidence the event is real and ran as scheduled. CONFIRMED distinct from granfondo-ecuador.json (separate organizer, course, and November date) — do not merge these profiles. catalog_flags.status_note: Confirmed NOT a duplicate of granfondo-ecuador.json despite sharing a location — verified via codex web research (GFNY's own March 2026 post-event report) as two genuinely separate events, same city, different organizers/courses/dates.
